---
title: 'How To Make A LEGO Cake!'
date: '2014-03-30T05:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'The Life In Fort Worth Blog'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7544432939956013253'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/how-to-make-lego-cake.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/The Life In Fort Worth Blog/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
---

<h2>
LEGO Cake Rocks!&nbsp;</h2>
<h3>
Birthday Fun</h3>
My kid wanted a LEGO Birthday Cake... So my wife got her creative hat on and went to work. Here's how she did it.<br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-1-fdb3af904ce6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-1-fdb3af904ce6.jpg" height="480" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="640" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com&nbsp;</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Overview</h4>
So my kids REALLY enjoy LEGO! LEGO everything! So a while back <strike>we </strike>(my wife) made a LEGO CAKE for my son's birthday! I thought I'd take a break from reviewing places and tell you how to make it.<br />
<br />
<h4>
You'll need:</h4>
<br />
<div>
<ul>
<li>Three Rectangular Cakes (Any Flavor, we chose "Rainbow White Cake")</li>
<li>Several Batches of Chocolate Chip Cookies (or you favorite kind).&nbsp;</li>
<li>One Over-sized Bottle Cap from a large three liter bottle.&nbsp;</li>
<ul>
<li>Or some other round object the size you want.&nbsp;</li>
<li><i>* She did find that the ridges in the bottle cap tended to stick to the cookies making them hard to get out. She destroyed several. Finding something with not inside edges could be good.&nbsp;</i></li>
</ul>
<li>White Frosting</li>
<li>Food Coloring</li>
<li>Baking Sheet (Or Large Presentation Dish, once it's built you kind of don't pick it up).&nbsp;</li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
The steps:</h4>
</div>
<br />
<div>
<ol>
<li>Use REAL LEGO bricks to build your model.</li>
<li>Bake the Cakes and Cookies.</li>
<li>Use the cookie cutter/bottle cap to cut as many round little cookies as you want.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Cut off the top layer, making it flat. Frost the first cake.</li>
<li>Leave any area you are stacking on flat. The exposed area frost several cookies, stacked on each other and place those on top to make the LEGO DOT look.&nbsp;</li>
<li>Keep Stacking layer by layer.</li>
<li>Add Real LEGO toys on top.</li>
</ol>
<div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
Pictures Tell The Real Story:</h4>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-5b930626b7dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-5b930626b7dd.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cake-and-cookies-295d6c9cfa40.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cake-and-cookies-295d6c9cfa40.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bottle-cap-turns-cookie-into-dot-5e629a8c5763.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bottle-cap-turns-cookie-into-dot-5e629a8c5763.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-dots-and-bottle-caps-f046cff9e919.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cookie-dots-and-bottle-caps-f046cff9e919.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-under-construction-2-ca62680b34e3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-under-construction-2-ca62680b34e3.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-under-construction-b5a02ca6be84.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-under-construction-b5a02ca6be84.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-lego-model-for-the-cake-5669613cab2c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/the-lego-model-for-the-cake-5669613cab2c.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-and-lego-model-c01a0fd20b86.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-and-lego-model-c01a0fd20b86.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-1-fdb3af904ce6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-1-fdb3af904ce6.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-2-92ec50c1d592.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-2-92ec50c1d592.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-121935b6a270.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-121935b6a270.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-5b930626b7dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/lego-cake-3-5b930626b7dd.jpg" height="240" title="LEGO CAKE Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com " width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Cost</h4>
Very Cheap. Didn't count the cost on this one, but it's a few box cake mixes from the store, cookies mix, frosting, time.<br />
<br />
The Actual LEGO's to put on top the cake were the most expensive part, but that would have been wrapped as a present anyway had we not done this.<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Kids</h4>
<br />
My kids REALLY enjoyed this!<br />
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Have you ever made any fun birthday cakes? Share you ideas in the comments on this post, and link to them if you have pictures or posts on it.&nbsp;</h4>
<br />
<br />
<b>Life In Fort Worth By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<h4>
Blog Connect:</h4>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li>
<li><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/103906191345996094295/+LifeInFortWorthBlog/posts" target="_blank">Google+ LifeInFortWorth</a></li>
<li>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></li>
<li>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></li>
<li>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://lifeinwortworth.yelp.com/" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></li>
</ul>
<h4>
Connect:</h4>
<div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;">
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-5eb48148a2fd.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-edc9e1cba163.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-3ffb893d0144.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-e84cbcff6e22.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div>
<br />
<br />
<h4>
Disclaimers<b>:</b></h4>
<i>* This information is AS IS. I make no assumptions to know everything, or be up to date. I am a fellow traveler passing on what I learn to you. If you need official assistance from a professional, please get that help from them.&nbsp;</i><br />
<i></i><br />
<div>
<i>*Affiliate Links may be included. In some instances I make money from the reviews of products or services I do here. In some cases I get a few freebies as well. Nevertheless, I only leave my honest reviews. This is how I see it. They can pay me to review, they can't pay me for how my review turns out. Please see my full disclosure list at:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/p/about.html" target="_blank">Start Here - About</a>.&nbsp;</i></div>
<br />
<div>
</div>
<br />
<h4 style="-webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; letter-spacing: normal; line-height: normal; orphans: auto; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: auto; word-spacing: 0px;">
<b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4>
</div>
